program_en: B.Sc. in Aerospace Science and Earth Informatics & X Double Major Programme
program_chi: 航天科學與地球信息學及X理學士雙主修課程

groups_outline.title: 1st Major: Aerospace Science and Earth Informatics

structure.title: 1st Major: Aerospace Science and Earth Informatics

children.title: Elective Courses
children.note: Students are required to take a total of 27 units of elective courses from the area which corresponds to the 2nd Major chosen by them. 6-15 units to be taken from Group A, and 12-21 units from Group B, of which at least 21 units of courses should be from 2000 or above level. Among the 21 units of courses, 12 units of courses should be from 3000 or above level (including at least 6 units of courses at 4000 level). Areas

Science and Big Data Technology (CUHK(SZ)) Group A: Courses offered by CUHK(SZ): CSC1002, DDA3005, 3020, 4220, MAT1002, 3007, STA2001 Group B: Courses offered by CUHK(SZ): CHM1001, ECE2001, 2050, 4010, MAT2001, PHY1010, 2020, 2650, 3650, URM3030, 3120, 4020 Students can also take the following elective courses offered by CUHK to fulfill the requirements of Group B

Management (CUHK(SZ)) Group A: Courses offered by CUHK(SZ): URM3010, 3030, 3120, 4010, 4020, 4110, 4150 Group B: Course offered by CUHK(SZ): CHM1001, CSC1002, DDA3005, 3020, 4220, ECE2001, 2050, 3060, 4010, ENE3004, 3005, 3006, 3050, 4007, 4008, MAT1002, 2001, 3007, PHY1010, 2002, 2020, 2610, 2650, 3002, 3110, 3240, 3410, 3650, 3710, 3810, 3820, 3950, 3960, 4001, 4510 Students can also take the following elective courses offered by CUHK to fulfill the requirements of Group B

and Computer Engineering (CUHK(SZ)) Group A: Courses offered by CUHK(SZ): ECE2001, 2050, 3060, 4010, MAT1002, 3007 Group B: Course offered by CUHK(SZ): CHM1001, CSC1002, DDA3005, 3020, 4220, ENE3004, 3005, 3006, 3050, 4007, 4008, MAT2001, PHY1010, 2002, 2020, 2610, 2650, 3002, 3110, 3240, 3410, 3650, 3710, 3810, 3820, 3950, 3960, 4001, 4510, STA2001, URM3010, 3030, 3120, 4010, 4020, 4110, 4150 Students can also take the following elective courses offered by CUHK to fulfill the requirements of Group B

Energy Science and Engineering (CUHK(SZ)) Group A: Courses offered by CUHK(SZ): CHM1001, ECE2001, ENE3004, 3005, 3006, 3050, 4007, 4008, PHY1010 Group B: Course offered by CUHK(SZ): CSC1002, DDA3005, 3020, 4220, ECE2050, 3060, 4010, MAT1002, 2001, 3007, PHY2002, 2020, 2610, 2650, 3002, 3110, 3240, 3410, 3650, 3710, 3810, 3820, 3950, 3960, 4001, 4510, STA2001, URM3010, 3030, 3120, 4010, 4020, 4110, 4150 Students can also take the following elective courses offered by CUHK to fulfill the requirements of Group B
